title: thelymitra fragrans
intro: Thelymitra fragrans, also known as the sweet-fragrant sun orchid, is a rare and endemic species of orchid found in the southwestern region of Western Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Thelymitra fragrans has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Traditionally, the plant's roots and leaves are used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, as well as being incorporated into topical creams and ointments for skin conditions.
